programme.title: Christmas Survival
programme.desc: Sisters, Miranda (Gemma Whelan, 'Game of Thrones') and Lyla (Joely Richardson) come together for Christmas in this heart-warming holiday comedy. However, ancient sibling rivalries flare-up to sabotage the hope for a season of good will.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London Mitchell who is known as a Scrooge has previously lived an unscrupulous lifestyle, by divorcing his wife, barely seeing his children, and dumping a woman a month before Christmas to be with somebody else.

programme.title: Holiday Baggage
programme.desc: Respectively a pediatrician and soon to be retired commercial pilot, Sarah and Pete Murphy, who have two grown daughters Lisa and Holly, have been legally separated for ten years. They lead different lives, Pete who lives hard, cavorts around the world and did cheat on Sarah when they were together, while Sarah is more focused on family. Since the separation which the girls mistakenly believe is a full divorce, Pete has been out of his family's life, he who has made little effort to keep in touch, while Lisa in particular has purposefully excluded her father from her life, including not inviting him to her wedding to longtime fiancé and family friend/neighbor Andrew Priester, and not having told him that they are having a baby. Sarah has not condoned Lisa's attitude, but also has done nothing to try and change it. Just prior to Thanksgiving, Pete is forced to return to Chicago to meet with Sarah when he makes the decision to remarry, to a woman named Kelly, who is young enough to be his daughter and with who he is moving permanently to the Bahamas, and thus requires Sarah to sign the final divorce papers. He expects solely to be in Chicago long enough to see Sarah and the girls to tell them the news and to invite them to the wedding. Out of circumstance, Pete is forced to stay in Chicago longer than he anticipated. In finding out about all that has and is going on in Sarah and the girls' lives, Pete may take stock of his relationships with them and if time will have healed all wounds in their family.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: Landscape architect Evie meets her match with new client Ryan, whose daughters are her biggest fan.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a garden with a plant-loving country boy to appease her boss.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: A dancer and a boxer must team up for a big performance after a last minute drop out.

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lilah is at odds with tech innovator Charlie who buys her family restaurant.

programme.title: My 11th Mother
programme.desc: Jae-su and 11th mother, hostile at first, forge a bond over time, building trust in their self-reliant world.

programme.title: Big Match (Squid Game's Lee Jung-jae)
programme.desc: Choi Ik-ho is a baseball player turned a WFC fighter after getting banned from the baseball league over an assault charge. He is enormously talented in fighting and soon becomes a superstar in the WFC. However, one day the police come to find him and tell him that Young-ho, his brother and manager who had gone missing, has been arrested as a prime suspect for a murder of a man who had visited Young-ho to suggest a game for Ik-ho.

programme.title: Sunny
programme.desc: Soon-yi joins band heading to Vietnam to find her husband in the Vietnam War, singing for soldiers there.

programme.title: Just Between Us Girls
programme.desc: Amber, Naomi and Morgan have been close friends since high school. Now twenty years into their friendship, a typical girls' night out becomes anything but when loyalties are compromised, dark secrets are revealed, and traumatic truths are told.

programme.title: Dollhouse
programme.desc: Ella ends up encountering a strange man that is infatuated with young black women, while on the job. The man happens to be the infamous Dollhouse Killer, who turns his victims into perfect dolls for his pleasure.

programme.title: Insatiable
programme.desc: When Danielle's family put her out for being rebellious, she is offered refuge at the best friend Tomeka's house with her mother. Things quickly go from a helping hand to a game of survival as Tomeka's mother comes up with a plan to help her family with the money issues that have helped them in the past. And all those who are not blood-related are in grave danger. Will Danielle let history repeat itself, or will she be in for the fight of her life?

programme.title: Things My Daddy Should've Told Me
programme.desc: Three women, three backgrounds, three different outcomes. But, one thing that all of these women have in common - each other. Follow them on a journey to find the love, support, and knowledge that they should've had all along.

programme.title: Induced
programme.desc: An expectant couple heads to a remote cabin to have a natural childbirth, but comes under attack from a predatory midwife who will stop at nothing to snatch their unborn child from them.

programme.title: Raging Sharks
programme.desc: After debris from an alien spaceship lands in the sea, great white sharks begin terrorizing marine scientists.

programme.title: Sharknado: Heart of Sharkness
programme.desc: A hilarious mockumentary about the filmmaker who first dreamed of "sharks in a tornado" - and brought on disaster by using real sharks.

programme.title: Shark Lake
programme.desc: Action legend Dolph Lundgren goes head to head with a bloodthirsty shark that has a resort town under siege.

programme.title: Shark in Venice
programme.desc: While investigating the mysterious death of his father, a famous archaeologist (Stephen Baldwin) discovers a killer secret hidden below the surface of Venice's scenic canals.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Tidal Wave: No Escape
programme.desc: When brutal tidal waves suddenly destroy many coastal communities in a short period of time, John Wahl (Corbin Bernsen), a Nobel Prize winner, teams up with a Navy officer to find out the cause of the disaster.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row (Ray Liotta, "Goodfellas") is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavior modification program. Also starring Willem Dafoe, Michelle Rodriguez ("Lost") and Stephen Rea ("The Crying Game").

programme.title: Double Identity
programme.desc: An American doctor (Val Kilmer) takes a detour in life and becomes a victim of mistaken identity when he helps a mysterious woman (Izabella Miko) escape from her would-be assailant.

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: The Moody Blues
programme.desc: Celebrating the 50th anniversary of their landmark album, Days of Future Passed, The Moody Blues took to the road to perform the entire LP live. This film, capturing an electric evening at The Sony Centre, Toronto, where the band was joined on stage by a full orchestra for the first time ever, is the definitive performance of this seminal album. This spectacle of a show features stunning visuals and a unique narration performed by Jeremy Irons, transporting the audience and viewer to the psychedelic dream world of their classic record. Including the iconic hits Nights In White Satin and Tuesday Afternoon, this film truly pays homage to five decades of musical mastery. In this impressive yet intimate auditorium, The Moody Blues have never sounded better.

programme.title: Britney Spears

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Noche de sorpresas

programme.title: Vino el amor: Amenazante mujer
programme.desc: Luciana se pone muy celosa al conocer a Graciela. Mientras, Luciana le dice a David que lo correcto es tratarse solo de manera laboral. Graciela le aconseja a Fernanda que se haga amiga de Luciana.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Matilde ve el rostro de Amadeo desfigurado por los golpes. Al notar su desconcierto, Benítez aprovecha para confundirla, preguntándole si ese es el hombre que fue a su casa en busca de Manuel.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Por fin libre
programme.desc: Doris se pone furiosa al enterarse que Maricruz está libre Álvaro le confiesa a su hija que está muy enamorado de Maricruz Doris amenaza a Octavio, pues si no se casa con ella, ella se vengará.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Amor verdadero
programme.desc: Mientras Gaviota y Rodrigo pasan el tiempo disfrutando de su amor, Sofia y James tratan de salvar la plantación. Francisco cae en el juego de una mujer igual de fraudulenta que él. Aarón acusa a Rodrigo y a Gaviota de las exportaciones ilegales.

programme.title: Teresa: Corazón roto
programme.desc: Rosita muere y Teresa se pone muy mal. Mariano le cuenta a Aurora que Teresa es el amor de su vida y ella se pone muy triste. Esperanza descubre que Rubén no dejará a su esposa y se pone celosa porque se irá de viaje con ella.

programme.title: Rubí: Reencuentro poco amistoso
programme.desc: Maribel visita a Rubí en Cancún y le dice que ahora se espere todo de ella, al salir del hotel se encuentra con Héctor y lo besa, diciéndole que aún lo ama Alejandro le aconseja a Sofía que le diga a Luis el secreto de su papá.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: El último suspiro
programme.desc: La hija de Sofía sale de la operación con excelentes resultados. Yuliana muere, pero antes le agradece a Juan por haberla hecho inmensamente feliz.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya asegura que María es una mala mujer. Soraya teme que el juez la descubra. Nandito y Alicia declaran en contra de Soraya pero ella lo desmiente todo.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya le asegura al juez que es inocente. Soraya queda en libertad, Alicia se pone muy nerviosa ya que tendrá que regresar a vivir con ella. Alicia se niega a regresar a vivir con Soraya. Soraya idea un plan para deshacerse de María.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche se encuentra muy agradecida con Jorge Luis, ya que, gracias a él, su hermano se ha recuperado del accidente. Jorge Luis se pelea con Santiago al escuchar las cosas que le dice a su padre.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: San Genis no puede esperar más y le pide a Bella que cumpla con su parte del trato y se case con él. Marimar le confiesa a Sergio que es la nueva dueña de la hacienda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Soraya asegura que María es una mala mujer. Soraya teme que el juez la descubra. Nandito y Alicia declaran en contra de Soraya pero ella lo desmiente todo.

programme.title: Alborada: Un milagro
programme.desc: Diego se entera de que Esperanza está esperando un hijo suyo y le dice que diga que su embarazo es un milagro de la Virgen. Antonio le dice a Juana que no tiene esposa ni hijos y que es divorciado.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina enfurece cuando Alonso le lleva serenata y lo recibe de una forma poco convencional. Ivana entra en la habitación de José Miguel e intenta seducirlo. Alonso se disculpa con Sandra por haber ocasionado la pelea entre ella y Felipe.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina le reclama a Rosendo por no haber demolido la escuela de la hacienda. José Miguel le regresa a Valentina el dinero del préstamo a Leonor. José Miguel le reclama a Leonor el dinero extra que le pidió a Valentina.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Don Ernesto habla con Isabel para tranquilizarla por la indiferencia de Ivana. Valentina le reclama a Gabriela por haber hablado con José Miguel. Felipe va a la casa de Sandra para disculparse por la escena de celos.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: José Miguel, Horacio y Felipe se reúnen en la cantina del pueblo. Ivana ayuda a José Miguel a llegar a su habitación. Leonor le exige a José Miguel que se quede con Ivana por lo sucedido la noche anterior.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Rocío le dice a Vicente que ama a Daniel, pero él desconoce el divorcio. El bebé de Purita tiene anemia y necesita un trasplante de médula para poder salvarlo, pero debe ser de un familiar y van con la madre superiora.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Marichuy dice a Candelaria, a sus papás y a Rafael que está enamorada del Dr. Cisneros. Juan Miguel cita a Ana Julia para decirle que no quiere que envenene a Marichuy y que lo deje en paz, ella le hace una confesión que lo deja impactado.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel lleva a Marichuy a la iglesia por la bendición del padre Anselmo. Amador le ofrece su ayuda a Vicente para recuperarse. Ana Julia les dice a Cecilia y a Patricio que está esperando un hijo de Juan Miguel.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Venganza
programme.desc: Vanesa decide reconquistar a Esteban para vengarse de Rogelio. Fermín sospecha que Carmen está interesada en Gustavo. Cynthia le pide a Rogelio que se divorcie de Ana Paula, pero sufre al saber que no podrá casarse con el hombre de sus sueños.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Fuera de casa
programme.desc: Alex le dice a María José que quiere que se vaya con su familia de su casa. Erick trata de convencer a Meche para que no comprometa a Paula con la policía. María José y su familia se van de la casa de Alex.

programme.title: La desalmada: La venganza
programme.desc: Leticia le pide a Fernanda no trabajar con Octavio. Fernanda entra a casa de Octavio para vengarse de él.

To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: To visit the Amalfi Coast is to taste lemons in every form. So what better place to visit than a lemon farm in Sorrento. We'll make the Italian lemon aperitif, Limoncello, with a local culinary tour guide, then visit a spectacular lemon farm overlooking the Mediterranean, where we make the local farm cheese, caciotta, with lemon, and a homemade lemon pasta with an Italian grandmother.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: The fairy tale village of Madremanya north of Barcelona is our base for making the most Spanish of foods, the small bites called tapas. Sara joins home cook and innkeeper Juame Vidal to make his Catalonian versions of classic tapas like Meatballs with Peas from his garden, Tomato Toast and the Potato Omelette called Tortilla Espanola.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: If you love Paella, the area around Valencia, Spain is the place to go. Every local has a proudly held secret recipe. We'll join one of them, local chef Franck Garanger for a market tour to gather ingredients for a very special Paella, cooked the traditional way, outside in the open air.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Home cooking of Puerto Rico is the focus of this episode. Sara welcomes a fan from Virginia into her kitchen to make Arroz con Gandules. Then Sara makes a sandwich version of a Puerto Rican classic, Picadillo. There are also tips on making a Salad in a Jar to take to work, and on ‘Ask Sara', cutting cherry tomatoes.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: The clean eating of the Middle East is on display when we visit Israeli-American chef Einat Admony and make her signature casserole, Sinaya. Sara contributes her own Baked Chicken Thighs with Artichokes and Lemon Pickles.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: There are cooking clubs and there are book clubs: this one is both. Each month this Napa, California club picks a cookbook from which to sample recipes at a pot luck dinner at a member's house. Sara joins to make two versions – Chicken and Prunes and Shrimp Tikka with Mango Chutney. We'll also visit a unique mens only cooking club – the Barbecue Pit Boys.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: California is farming country and on this episode we get a good look at what farm life really means when we visit a young farmer who documents his life on the vlog ricefarmingtv.com. He'll join Sara and a local sushi chef to make inside out cucumber roll and a classic California roll, plus, a totally unique sushi burger. Sara also makes Peppery Vegetarian Rice with San Francisco native and wok specialist, Grace Young

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Asian immigrants of all kinds have come to American and adapted their cuisine to ours in fascinating ways. Vietnamese immigrant Hung Huynh not only won the first season Top Chef but became an expert in cooking seafood. His whole Branzino is easy and delicious. We'll visit another group of Vietnamese immigrants in Houston, who adapted Cajun foods to their Vietnamese cuisine with fiery results. Finally, Sara adapts traditional Korean BimBimBap using ancient grains instead of rice.

programme.title: Pepper Spray and Guns
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia. Next, Matt and Froy battle biker girls when going after a motorcycle. And Finally, Matt and Froy confront a couple of delinquents in attempt to repo the couple's car, but they are soon sent running when the couple pushes back with guns.

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Cement Mixer
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: Tactical Planning
programme.desc: Matt and Froy walk into a moral gray area when they repossess a vehicle by stealing it. Then, Sonia and Matt discover their target van is being used in an investigation of highly toxic material. And, Matt poses as a valet to retrieve a car from an irate diner and his befuddled date.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Nursery Crime
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Adapt, Improvise, and Overcome
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry when the new guys aren't prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Thanda Safari, Thanda Private Game Reserve, Kwa-Zulu Natal
programme.desc: Sika's third Safari destination THANDA, meaning ‘Love' in isiZulu, is a proud member of “The Leading Hotels of the World” and known for exclusive close-up encounters with Africa's magnificent Big Five. The Lodge offers a unique Safari Experience with a deep Love and passionate commitment to the vibrant Zulu Culture and its History as well as critical Conservation efforts of the Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: Hot Life In Africa

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Molori Safari, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: Returning to the magnificent Madikwe Game Reserve for her sixth Safari destination, Sika visits MOLORI SAFARI, a boutique Safari Lodge overlooking the Dwarsberg Mountains and the Madikwe Valley. The Lodge is recognised as one of Southern Africa's most Private and Luxurious Safari Lodges and they are proudly actively engaged in ongoing Conservation efforts. A very unique and special feature is the Whiskey and Gin Bar at the secret Hideout where you can enjoy the magnificence of Wildlife only a few feet away from you around the Lodge's waterhole.

programme.title: Hot Life In Africa

programme.title: On Safari

programme.desc: Sika's fifth Safari destination is located in an untouched part of the Kariega Game Reserve of the Eastern Cape. SETTLERS DRIFT LODGE is set in a remote valley looking down onto the Bushmans River where last the 1820 Settlers guided their Ox-wagons across the River. It offers a unique and bespoke Luxury Tented Safari experience with abundant Wildlife encounters and even a River Safari.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: John Stamos, BAM Bus, Drew's News:Philadelphia Edition, Hometown Spirit Denver

Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are taking their desk on the road and serving you the news sunny-side up from Philadelphia. Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Denver.

programme.title: Steve
programme.desc: For five seasons, Steve Harvey hosted a daytime talk show that was based in Chicago. In 2017, looking to focus more on celebrity guests, the show got a face-lift -- including shortening the title to simply "Steve" -- along with a move to Los Angeles, where there is no shortage of famous people for Harvey to welcome to his stage as guests. In addition to conducting interviews, Harvey brings his fresh -- and often funny -- perspective to the day's hot topics and Hollywood happenings. The show also features games and comedy and lifestyle segments. Whether he's chatting with a star or sharing his opinions on the news, Harvey does it as only he can.

programme.desc: This was an extended 4-stunt episode. For the first stunt, contestants have to hang by their ankles from trapeze hanging from a helicopter that flew over 20 flagpoles. In the third, it's eating 4 ounces stinky cheese crawling with maggots. programme.title: Hawaii Sunrise Waves
programme.desc: Relax and help quiet your monkey mind with this beautiful sunrise scene filmed along the eastern shores of Oahu, Hawaii. Waves crash and glisten as the golden sun casts its warming rays, which looks best when viewed in 4K Ultra High Definition.

programme.title: Morning Sun on Yosemite Falls
programme.desc: Watch as the morning sunlight slowly casts its golden light onto the majestic Upper Yosemite Falls, with this 4K ultra high definition real-time nature video featuring stereo sounds captured along the falls trail. It's perfect for meditating or for transforming your TV into a window to one of North America's most grandiose and inspiring locations.

programme.title: Karamea National Park: New Zealand
programme.desc: There's no better way to feel nature's isolation than by going off the beaten track and exploring the quiet beaches, mysterious caves, and rainforested hills of this secluded haven.

programme.title: Tumpak Sewu Waterfalls: East Java
programme.desc: Dare to dream of standing at the edge of the tiered, plunging streams of Indonesia's Tumpak Sewu falls. You'll be so close that you will practically feel the mist on your face.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Hollyford Track: New Zealand
programme.desc: Take a stroll through a remote beech forest, full of diverse vegetation, waterfalls, and rocky streams.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Travel north to fly over Norway's magical fjords, tiny fishing villages, and stunning mountain landscapes.

programme.title: Wanderlust: Earth And Stars II
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Summer Fun I
programme.desc: Summer Fun E1: Sizzling, relaxing visual vacation.

programme.title: Summer Fun II

programme.title: Young at Heart I
programme.desc: Young at Heart E1 — Immerse yourself in a captivating display of whimsical & fantastical artwork. This collection is bound to delight & inspire the young at heart with its imaginative & playful depictions of the world, inviting you into a realm of enchantment & wonder.

programme.title: Young At Heart: Back to School
programme.desc: Young At Heart E2: Back to School — Showcasing a delightful array of imaginative and playful depictions, each artwork invites you into a realm of enchantment and wonder. The whimsical and fantastical elements are bound to delight, captivate, and inspire art enthusiasts of all ages.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Young & Bold by Bidgala
programme.desc: Emerging artist portfolio curated by Bidgala, a global online art community empowering young creatives.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.
